debug_info.goal:
V : Type u
inst✝ : DecidableEq V
G : SimpleGraph V
u v : V
p : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk V G u v
⊢ Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G u v inst✝ p) ≤
    Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G u v inst✝ p) + 1

failed_attempts:
induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | loop p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (by cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support])]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet p
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · intro he
        rcases List.mem_map.1 (Finset.mem_toFinset.1 he) with ⟨d, hd, rfl⟩
        have h_v : d.1 ∈ supportSet p ∧ d.2 ∈ supportSet p := by
          induction p with
          | nil => cases hd
          | loop p ih' =>
            simp [darts, supportSet, support] at hd ⊢
            rcases hd with rfl | hd
            · exact ⟨by cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support], by cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support]⟩
            · rcases ih' hd with ⟨h1, h2⟩; exact ⟨Finset.mem_insert_of_mem h1, Finset.mem_insert_of_mem h2⟩
          | cons h p ih' =>
            simp [darts, supportSet, support] at hd ⊢
            rcases hd with rfl | hd
            · exact ⟨by cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support], by cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support]⟩
            · rcases ih' hd with ⟨h1, h2⟩; exact ⟨Finset.mem_insert_of_mem h1, Finset.mem_insert_of_mem h2⟩
        rcases Sym2.mem_iff.1 (Sym2.mem_mk d.1 d.2 u) with rfl | rfl <;> [exact hu h_v.1; exact hu h_v.2]

have h_edge : ∀ {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) {e : Sym2 V}, e ∈ p.edgeSet → ∀ x ∈ e, x ∈ p.supportSet := by
    intro u v p e he x hx
    induction p with
    | nil => cases he
    | loop p ih' =>
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, supportSet, support] at he ⊢
      rcases he with (rfl | he)
      · simp at hx; subst hx; exact List.mem_cons_self _ _
      · exact List.mem_cons_of_mem _ (ih' he x hx)
    | cons h p ih' =>
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, supportSet, support] at he ⊢
      rcases he with (rfl | he)
      · simp at hx; rcases hx with (rfl | rfl)
        · exact List.mem_cons_self _ _
        · exact List.mem_cons_of_mem _ (by cases p <;> simp [support])
      · exact List.mem_cons_of_mem _ (ih' he x hx)
  induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | loop p ih =>
    have hu : u ∈ p.supportSet := List.mem_toFinset.mpr (by cases p <;> simp [support])
    rw [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons, Finset.insert_eq_self.mpr hu]
    exact ih.trans (add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_self.mpr hu]
      exact ih.trans (add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
    · have he : Sym2.mk (u, v) ∉ p.edgeSet := λ h_mem => hu (h_edge p h_mem u (by simp))
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
      exact add_le_add_right ih 1

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | loop p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (by cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support])]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.succ_le_succ (Finset.card_le_card (by simp)))
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.succ_le_succ (Finset.card_le_card (by simp)))
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.succ_le_succ ih
      · simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge]; rintro x y hxy (⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | ⟨rfl, rfl⟩) <;>
        ( have h' : x ∈ p.support ∧ y ∈ p.support := by induction p <;> cases hxy <;> simp [support, *]
          exact hu (by simp [supportSet, h']) )

have h_m : ∀ {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) e, e ∈ p.edgeSet → ∀ x ∈ e, x ∈ p.supportSet := by
    intro u v p e he x hx
    induction p <;> simp [edgeSet, supportSet, support, edges, darts, dartEdge] at *
    case nil => cases he
    case loop q ih => rcases he with rfl|he; {rcases Sym2.mem_iff.1 hx with rfl|rfl <;> simp}; {right; exact ih he x hx}
    case cons h q ih => rcases he with rfl|he; {rcases Sym2.mem_iff.1 hx with rfl|rfl; {simp}; {right; cases q <;> simp [supportSet, support]}}; {right; exact ih he x hx}
  induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, dartEdge]
  | loop q ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (by cases q <;> simp [supportSet, support])]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
  | cons h q ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ q.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem (by intro he; exact hu (h_m q _ he u (by simp)))]
      exact Nat.succ_le_succ ih

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | loop q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons]
    have : u ∈ q.supportSet := by cases q <;> simp [supportSet, support]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem this]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_insert _ _) 1)
  | cons h q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons, dartEdge]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ q.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_insert _ _) 1)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · intro he
        obtain ⟨d, hd, he⟩ := List.mem_map.1 (Finset.mem_toFinset.1 he)
        have h_mem : d.1 ∈ q.supportSet ∧ d.2 ∈ q.supportSet := by
          induction q <;> simp [darts, supportSet, support] at hd ⊢
          · rcases hd with rfl | hd; exact ⟨by simp, by cases ‹LoopWalk _ _› <;> simp [supportSet, support]⟩
            rcases ‹_› hd with ⟨h1, h2⟩; exact ⟨Or.inr h1, Or.inr h2⟩
          · rcases hd with rfl | hd; exact ⟨by simp, by simp⟩
            rcases ‹_› hd with ⟨h1, h2⟩; exact ⟨Or.inr h1, Or.inr h2⟩
        rcases Sym2.mem_iff.1 (by rw [he]; simp : u ∈ dartEdge d) with rfl | rfl <;> [exact hu h_mem.1; exact hu h_mem.2]

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, dartEdge]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet p
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_insert _ _) 1)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · simp only [edgeSet, List.mem_toFinset, List.mem_map, dartEdge, Sym2.eq_iff]
        rintro ⟨⟨x, y⟩, hd, rfl | rfl⟩ <;> apply hu
        all_goals (induction p <;> simp_all [supportSet, support, darts])
  | loop p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, dartEdge]
    have : u ∈ supportSet p := by (induction p <;> simp_all [supportSet, support, *])
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem this]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_insert _ _) 1)

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | loop p ih =>
    have hu : u ∈ p.supportSet := by cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support]
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge, hu]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge, List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
    · have h_e : ⟦(u, _)⟧ ∉ p.edgeSet := by
        intro h_e
        obtain ⟨d, hd, h_e⟩ := List.mem_map.mp (List.mem_toFinset.mp h_e)
        have h_d : d.1 ∈ p.supportSet ∧ d.2 ∈ p.supportSet := by
          induction p with
          | nil => cases hd
          | _ p ih' =>
            cases hd
            · constructor <;> (cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support])
            · specialize ih' (by assumption); exact ⟨by simp [supportSet, support, ih'.1], by simp [supportSet, support, ih'.2]⟩
        have : u ∈ Sym2.mk d := by rw [←h_e]; simp
        rw [Sym2.mem_iff] at this
        cases this with
        | inl h => rw [h] at h_d; exact hu h_d.1
        | inr h => rw [h] at h_d; exact hu h_d.2
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem h_e]
      exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | @loop _ _ u v p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons, dartEdge]
    have h : u ∈ p.supportSet := by rw [supportSet, List.mem_toFinset]; cases p <;> simp [support]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem h]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
  | @cons _ _ u v w h p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons, dartEdge]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · simp only [edgeSet, List.mem_toFinset, edges, List.mem_map, dartEdge, Sym2.eq_iff]
        rintro ⟨⟨x, y⟩, hd, rfl | rfl⟩ <;> apply hu
        all_goals
          induction p with
          | nil => contradiction
          | cons _ _ ih_1 =>
            simp [darts] at hd; rcases hd with rfl | hd
            · simp [supportSet, support]
            · simp [supportSet, support]; exact Or.inr (ih_1 hd)
          | loop _ ih_1 =>
            simp [darts] at hd; rcases hd with rfl | hd
            · simp [supportSet, support]
            · simp [supportSet, support]; exact Or.inr (ih_1 hd)

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | loop q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons]
    have : u ∈ q.supportSet := List.mem_toFinset.2 (by cases q <;> simp [support])
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem this]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
  | cons h q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ q.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      have he : Sym2.mk (u, _) ∉ q.edgeSet := by
        intro he
        obtain ⟨d, hd, he⟩ := Finset.mem_image.1 (List.mem_toFinset.1 he)
        have : d.1 ∈ q.support ∧ d.2 ∈ q.support := by
          clear ih hu; induction q with
          | nil => cases hd
          | cons _ q' ih' | loop q' ih' =>
            simp only [darts, List.mem_cons] at hd
            rcases hd with rfl | hd
            · constructor; simp [support]; cases q' <;> simp [support]
            · rcases ih' hd with ⟨h1, h2⟩; simp [support, h1, h2]
        rw [← he, Sym2.mem_iff] at this
        rcases this with ⟨h, _⟩ | ⟨_, h⟩ <;> exact hu (List.mem_toFinset.2 h)
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
      exact Nat.succ_le_succ ih

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | loop p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (by cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support])]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · intro he; apply hu
        have : ∀ {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) {e}, e ∈ p.edgeSet → ∀ x ∈ e, x ∈ p.supportSet := by
          intro u v p e he x hx; induction p <;> simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts] at he ⊢
          case loop q ih =>
            cases he with | head => simp | tail _ he => exact Or.inr (ih he hx)
          case cons h' q ih =>
            cases he with
            | head =>
              rw [Sym2.mk_mem_iff] at hx; cases hx <;> subst_vars
              · exact Or.inl rfl
              · exact Or.inr (by cases q <;> simp [supportSet, support])
            | tail _ he => exact Or.inr (ih he hx)
        exact this p he u (by simp)

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | cons _ p ih | loop p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons, dartEdge]
    by_cases h_u : u ∈ (support p).toFinset
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem h_u]; exact ih.trans (Nat.le_succ _)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem h_u, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · intro he
        have h_mem : ∀ e ∈ p.edgeSet, ∀ x ∈ e, x ∈ p.supportSet := by
          intro e he x hx
          induction p with
          | nil => cases (List.mem_toFinset.1 he)
          | cons _ p ih | loop p ih =>
            simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge] at he
            rcases he with (rfl | he)
            · simp [Sym2.mem_iff] at hx; rcases hx with (rfl | rfl)
              · exact Finset.mem_insert_self ..
              · exact Finset.mem_insert_of_mem (List.mem_toFinset.2 (List.mem_cons_self ..))
            · exact Finset.mem_insert_of_mem (ih he)
        exact h_u (h_mem _ he u (by simp))

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]; exact ih.trans (Nat.succ_le_succ (Finset.card_le_insert _ _))
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.succ_le_succ ih
      · intro he
        have h_mem : ∀ {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) {e}, e ∈ p.edgeSet → ∀ x ∈ e, x ∈ p.supportSet
        · intro u v p e he x hx; induction p with
          | nil => cases he
          | cons h' p' ih' =>
            simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, supportSet, support] at he ⊢
            cases he with
            | head heq =>
              subst heq; cases Sym2.mem_iff.mp hx with
              | inl hx => subst hx; exact Or.inl rfl
              | inr hx => subst hx; right; cases p' <;> simp [support]
            | tail h_tail => exact Or.inr (ih' h_tail hx)
          | loop p' ih' =>
            simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, supportSet, support] at he ⊢
            cases he with
            | head heq => subst heq; left; exact (Sym2.mem_iff.mp hx).elim id id
            | tail h_tail => exact Or.inr (ih' h_tail hx)
        exact hu (h_mem p he u (Sym2.mem_mk_left u v))
  | loop p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons]
    have : u ∈ p.supportSet := by cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem this]; exact ih.trans (Nat.succ_le_succ (Finset.card_le_insert _ _))

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | loop q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons, dartEdge]
    rw [Finset.card_insert_of_mem (List.mem_toFinset.mpr (by cases q <;> simp [support]))]
    exact ih.trans (add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
  | cons h q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons, List.toFinset_map, dartEdge]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ (support q).toFinset
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
    · have h_not_mem : Sym2.mk (u, _) ∉ (edges q).toFinset := by
        intro h_mem
        simp only [edges, List.mem_toFinset, List.mem_map, dartEdge, Sym2.mem_iff] at h_mem
        rcases h_mem with ⟨d, hd, (rfl | rfl)⟩
        all_goals {
          apply hu; rw [List.mem_toFinset]
          induction q with
          | nil => cases hd
          | loop q' ih' =>
            simp [darts, support] at hd ⊢
            rcases hd with (rfl | h_in) <;> [left; right]; rfl; exact ih' h_in
          | cons h' q' ih' =>
            simp [darts, support] at hd ⊢
            rcases hd with (rfl | h_in)
            · left; rfl
            · right; exact ih' h_in
        }
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem h_not_mem]
      exact add_le_add_right ih 1

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | loop p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (by cases p <;> simp [support, List.mem_toFinset])]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.succ_le_succ (Finset.card_le_subset (Finset.subset_insert _ _)))
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.support.toFinset
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.succ_le_succ (Finset.card_le_subset (Finset.subset_insert _ _)))
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Nat.add_le_add_iff_right]
      have : Sym2.mk (u, v) ∉ p.edges.toFinset := by
        intro h_mem
        rcases List.mem_map.mp (List.mem_toFinset.mp h_mem) with ⟨⟨x, y⟩, hxy, heq⟩
        have : u ∈ ({x, y} : Set V) := by rw [← Sym2.mem_iff, ← heq]; simp
        induction p with
        | nil => cases hxy
        | loop p ih' => cases hxy <;> [injection ‹_›; skip] <;> subst_vars <;> [cases p <;> simp [support, List.mem_toFinset] at *; simp [support, ih' ‹_›]]
        | cons h' p ih' => cases hxy <;> [injection ‹_›; skip] <;> subst_vars <;> [simp [support, List.mem_toFinset]; simp [support, ih' ‹_›]]
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem this]; exact ih

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | loop q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge, List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (by cases q <;> simp [supportSet, support])]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_insert _ _) 1)
  | cons h q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge, List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet q
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_insert _ _) 1)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · intro he
        simp only [edgeSet, edges, List.mem_toFinset, List.mem_map, dartEdge] at he
        rcases he with ⟨d, hd, heq⟩
        have h_mem : d.1 ∈ supportSet q ∧ d.2 ∈ supportSet q := by
          induction q with
          | nil => cases hd
          | cons _ _ ih' =>
            cases hd with
            | head => simp [supportSet, support]
            | tail _ ht => specialize ih' ht; simp [supportSet, support, ih']
          | loop _ ih' =>
            cases hd with
            | head => simp [supportSet, support]
            | tail _ ht => specialize ih' ht; simp [supportSet, support, ih']
        have : u ∈ Sym2.mk d := by rw [heq]; simp
        rw [Sym2.mem_iff] at this
        rcases this with h | h
        · exact hu (h ▸ h_mem.1)
        · exact hu (h ▸ h_mem.2)

have h_start : ∀ {x y} (q : G.LoopWalk x y), x ∈ q.supportSet := by
    intros; cases ‹LoopWalk _ _› <;> simp [supportSet, support]
  have h_sub : ∀ {x y} (q : G.LoopWalk x y) (e ∈ q.edgeSet) (z), z ∈ e → z ∈ q.supportSet := by
    intros x y q e he z hz
    induction q with
    | nil => simp [edgeSet, edges, darts] at he
    | cons h' q' ih' =>
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, supportSet, support, Sym2.mem_iff] at *
      rcases he with rfl | he
      · rcases hz with rfl | rfl; · simp; · right; exact h_start q'
      · right; exact ih' he hz
    | loop q' ih' =>
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, supportSet, support, Sym2.mem_iff] at *
      rcases he with rfl | he
      · rcases hz with rfl | rfl <;> simp
      · right; exact ih' he hz
  induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons, dartEdge]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
    · have he : Sym2.mk (u, _) ∉ p.edgeSet := by
        intro he; exact hu (h_sub p he u (by simp))
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
      exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
  | loop p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons, dartEdge]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (h_start p)]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)

have h_s : ∀ {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v), u ∈ p.supportSet := by
    intro _ _ p; induction p <;> simp [supportSet, support, *]
  have h_e : ∀ {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) {e x}, e ∈ p.edgeSet → x ∈ e → x ∈ p.supportSet := by
    intro _ _ p e x he hx; induction p <;> simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge, *] at *
    all_goals (rcases he with rfl | he <;> (try rcases Sym2.mem_iff.1 hx with rfl | rfl) <;> simp [h_s, *])
  induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | loop p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge, h_s p,
      ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)]
  | cons h p ih =>
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge, hu,
        ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)]
    · have h_uv : ⟦(u, v)⟧ ∉ p.edgeSet := λ he ↦ hu (h_e p he (Sym2.mem_mk_left u v))
      simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge, hu, h_uv, ih]

have h_v : ∀ {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v), u ∈ p.supportSet ∧ ∀ d ∈ p.darts, d.1 ∈ p.supportSet ∧ d.2 ∈ p.supportSet := by
    intro u v p; induction p with
    | nil => simp [supportSet, support, darts]
    | loop q ih =>
      simp [supportSet, support, darts] at *
      exact ⟨ih.1, λ d hd => (by rcases hd with rfl | hd <;> [simp [ih.1]; exact ⟨Or.inr (ih.2 d hd).1, Or.inr (ih.2 d hd).2⟩])⟩
    | cons h q ih =>
      simp [supportSet, support, darts] at *
      exact ⟨Or.inl rfl, λ d hd => (by rcases hd with rfl | hd <;> [simp [ih.1]; exact ⟨Or.inr (ih.2 d hd).1, Or.inr (ih.2 d hd).2⟩])⟩
  induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | loop q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons, dartEdge]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (h_v q).1]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
  | cons h q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons, dartEdge]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet q
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · intro h_mem; simp only [edgeSet, edges, List.mem_toFinset, List.mem_map, dartEdge, Sym2.eq_iff] at h_mem
        rcases h_mem with ⟨d, hd, rfl | rfl⟩ <;> apply hu
        · exact (h_v q).2 d hd |>.1
        · exact (h_v q).2 d hd |>.2

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | loop q ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (by simp [supportSet, support])]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
  | cons h q ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet q
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · intro he
        have : u ∈ supportSet q := by
          induction q with
          | nil => simp [edgeSet] at he
          | loop q' ih' =>
            simp [edgeSet, supportSet, support] at he ⊢
            rcases he with he | he
            · rcases Sym2.eq_iff.mp he with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ <;> exact List.mem_toFinset.mpr (List.mem_cons_self _ _)
            · exact ih' he
          | cons h' q' ih' =>
            simp [edgeSet, supportSet, support] at he ⊢
            rcases he with he | he
            · rcases Sym2.eq_iff.mp he with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
              · left; rfl
              · right; exact List.mem_toFinset.mpr (List.mem_cons_self _ _)
            · exact ih' he
        exact hu this

have h_start {u v : V} (p' : G.LoopWalk u v) : u ∈ p'.supportSet := by
    induction p' <;> simp [supportSet, support, *]
  have h_edge {u v : V} (p' : G.LoopWalk u v) {e} (he : e ∈ p'.edgeSet) {x} (hx : x ∈ e) : x ∈ p'.supportSet := by
    induction p' with
    | nil => cases he
    | loop p'' ih =>
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, supportSet, support] at he ⊢
      cases he with
      | head h => subst h; simp [Sym2.mem_iff] at hx; cases hx <;> subst_vars <;> left <;> rfl
      | tail h => right; exact ih h hx
    | cons h'' p'' ih =>
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, supportSet, support] at he ⊢
      cases he with
      | head h => subst h; simp [Sym2.mem_iff] at hx; cases hx <;> subst_vars <;> [left; (right; apply h_start)] <;> rfl
      | tail h => right; exact ih h hx
  induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | loop p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, h_start p]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.succ_le_succ ih
      · intro h_in; exact hu (h_edge p h_in (by simp))

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | loop q ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge]
    rw [Finset.card_insert_of_mem (List.mem_toFinset.mpr (by cases q <;> simp [support]))]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
  | cons h q ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet q
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · intro he
        rcases List.mem_map.1 (List.mem_toFinset.1 he) with ⟨⟨x, y⟩, hd, heq⟩
        have hq : x ∈ q.support ∧ y ∈ q.support := by
          induction q with
          | nil => cases hd
          | loop q' ih' =>
            simp [darts, support] at hd ⊢
            rcases hd with (rfl | hd) <;> [simp; exact ih' hd]
          | cons h' q' ih' =>
            simp [darts, support] at hd ⊢
            rcases hd with (rfl | hd) <;> [exact ⟨by simp, by cases q' <;> simp [support]⟩; exact ih' hd]
        rcases Sym2.mem_iff.1 (heq.symm ▸ (by simp : u ∈ Sym2.mk (u, v))) with rfl | rfl
        · exact hu (List.mem_toFinset.2 hq.1)
        · exact hu (List.mem_toFinset.2 hq.2)

have h_start : ∀ {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v), u ∈ p.supportSet := by
    intro u v p; cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support]
  have h_endpoints : ∀ {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) {e x}, e ∈ p.edgeSet → x ∈ e → x ∈ p.supportSet := by
    intro u v p e x he hx; induction p with
    | nil => cases he
    | cons h q ih' | loop q ih' =>
      simp only [edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons, dartEdge, Finset.mem_insert, supportSet, support] at he ⊢
      rcases he with (rfl | he)
      · cases Sym2.mem_iff.1 hx with | _ hx => rw [hx]; simp [h_start q]
      · exact Finset.mem_insert_of_mem (ih' he hx)
  induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | cons h q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons, dartEdge]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ q.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · intro h_mem; exact hu (h_endpoints q h_mem (Sym2.mem_iff.2 (Or.inl rfl)))
  | loop q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons, dartEdge]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (h_start q)]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | loop q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons, dartEdge]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (by cases q <;> simp [support])]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) _)
  | cons h q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons, dartEdge]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet q
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) _)
    · have he : Sym2.mk (u, _) ∉ edgeSet q := by
        intro h_mem
        rw [edgeSet, List.mem_toFinset, List.mem_map] at h_mem
        obtain ⟨d, hd_mem, hd_eq⟩ := h_mem
        have h_supp : d.1 ∈ q.support := by
          induction q with
          | nil => cases hd_mem
          | cons _ _ ih' | loop _ ih' =>
            cases hd_mem with | head => exact List.mem_cons_self _ _
                              | tail hd_mem => exact List.mem_cons_of_mem _ (ih' hd_mem)
        rw [Sym2.eq_iff] at hd_eq
        cases hd_eq <;> (rename_i hxy; rw [hxy.1] at h_supp; exact hu (List.mem_toFinset.mpr h_supp))
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
      exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | loop p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (by simp [supportSet, support])]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet p
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
    · have h_uv : Sym2.mk (u, v) ∉ edgeSet p := by
        intro h_mem; obtain ⟨d, hd, he⟩ := Finset.mem_image.1 (List.mem_toFinset.1 h_mem)
        have h_v : d.1 ∈ supportSet p ∧ d.2 ∈ supportSet p := by
          induction p with
          | nil => contradiction
          | loop p' ih' => rcases hd with (rfl | hd) <;> simp [supportSet, support] at *; exact ih' hd
          | cons h' p' ih' => rcases hd with (rfl | hd) <;> simp [supportSet, support] at *; (try exact ih' hd)
        have : u ∈ supportSet p := by rcases Sym2.eq_iff.1 he with (⟨rfl, _⟩ | ⟨_, rfl⟩) <;> [exact h_v.1; exact h_v.2]
        exact hu this
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem h_uv]
      exact add_le_add_right ih 1

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | loop p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons]
    rw [Finset.card_insert_of_mem (by cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support])]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_of_subset (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet p
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_of_subset (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
    · have h_mem : Sym2.mk u v ∉ edgeSet p := by
        intro h_mem
        have h_ends : ∀ {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) {e x}, e ∈ edgeSet p → x ∈ e → x ∈ supportSet p := by
          intro u v p e x he hx
          induction p <;> simp only [edgeSet, edges, darts, supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons, Finset.mem_insert, dartEdge] at he ⊢
          · cases he
          · rcases he with rfl | he
            · rcases Sym2.mem_iff.mp hx with rfl | rfl
              · left; rfl
              · right; cases ‹LoopWalk _ _› <;> simp [supportSet, support]
            · right; exact ‹_› he
          · rcases he with rfl | he
            · exact (Sym2.mem_iff.mp hx).elim (fun h => by left; exact h) (fun h => by left; exact h)
            · right; exact ‹_› he
        exact hu (h_ends p h_mem u (by simp))
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem h_mem]
      exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet]
  | loop q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    have : u ∈ supportSet q := by cases q <;> simp [supportSet, support]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem this]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
  | cons h q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet q
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) 1)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · intro he; rw [edgeSet, edges, dartEdge, List.toFinset_map, Finset.mem_image] at he
        rcases he with ⟨⟨a, b⟩, hab, heq⟩
        rw [List.mem_toFinset] at hab
        have : a ∈ supportSet q ∧ b ∈ supportSet q := by
          clear hu ih h; induction q with
          | nil => contradiction
          | cons _ q' ih' => cases hab with | head => (cases q' <;> simp [supportSet, support]) | tail hab =>
            specialize ih' hab; exact ⟨Or.inr ih'.1, Or.inr ih'.2⟩
          | loop q' ih' => cases hab with | head => (cases q' <;> simp [supportSet, support]) | tail hab =>
            specialize ih' hab; exact ⟨Or.inr ih'.1, Or.inr ih'.2⟩
        rw [Sym2.eq_iff] at heq
        cases heq <;> rename_i h_eq <;> (rw [h_eq.1] at *; first | exact hu this.1 | exact hu this.2)

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, darts]
  | loop p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, darts, edges, List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons]
    have hu : u ∈ p.supportSet := by induction p <;> simp [supportSet, support, *]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.le_succ _)
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, darts, edges, List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons]
    rw [Finset.card_insert_eq_ite, Finset.card_insert_eq_ite]
    split_ifs with hu he
    · exact ih
    · exact ih.trans (Nat.le_succ _)
    · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
    · exfalso
      simp [edgeSet, List.mem_toFinset, Sym2.eq_iff] at he
      obtain ⟨⟨x, y⟩, hd, hxy⟩ := he
      have h_mem : x ∈ p.support ∧ y ∈ p.support := by
        induction p with
        | nil => cases hd
        | cons _ _ ih' => cases hd; exact ⟨Or.inl rfl, (by induction p <;> simp [support, *])⟩; exact ⟨Or.inr (ih' (by assumption)).1, Or.inr (ih' (by assumption)).2⟩
        | loop _ ih' => cases hd; exact ⟨Or.inl rfl, Or.inl rfl⟩; exact ⟨Or.inr (ih' (by assumption)).1, Or.inr (ih' (by assumption)).2⟩
      rcases hxy with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ <;> apply hu <;> simp [supportSet, *]

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | loop p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge, List.toFinset_cons]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (List.mem_toFinset.2 (by induction p <;> simp [support]))]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.succ_le_succ (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)))
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, dartEdge, List.toFinset_cons]
    by_cases h_u : u ∈ supportSet p
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem h_u]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.succ_le_succ (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)))
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem h_u, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.succ_le_succ ih
      · intro he
        obtain ⟨⟨a, b⟩, hd, he⟩ := List.mem_map.1 (List.mem_toFinset.1 he)
        have : a ∈ p.support ∧ b ∈ p.support := by
          induction p <;> simp_all [darts, support]
          case cons ih => rcases hd with (rfl | hd) <;> tauto
          case loop ih => rcases hd with (rfl | hd) <;> tauto
        rcases Sym2.mem_iff.1 (he ▸ Sym2.mem_mk_left u b) with (rfl | rfl) <;>
        simp [supportSet] at * <;> tauto

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, darts]
  | loop q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, darts, edges, List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (by cases q <;> simp [supportSet, support])]
    exact ih.trans (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _))
  | cons h q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, darts, edges, List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet q
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]; exact ih.trans (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _))
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · intro he;
        have h_sub : ∀ {e x}, e ∈ edgeSet q → x ∈ e → x ∈ supportSet q := by
          intro e x he hx; obtain ⟨d, hd, rfl⟩ := Finset.mem_image.1 he
          induction q with
          | nil => cases hd
          | cons _ _ ih' | loop _ ih' => 
            simp [darts, supportSet, support] at hd ⊢
            rcases hd with rfl | hd; {simp [supportSet, support] at hx ⊢; exact hx}; {exact Or.inr (ih' hd hx)}
        exact hu (h_sub he (by simp))

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | loop p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons]
    have : u ∈ p.support := by cases p <;> simp [support]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_self.mpr (List.mem_toFinset.mpr this)]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.le_succ _)
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_self.mpr hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.le_succ _)
    · have h_e : dartEdge (u, _) ∉ p.edgeSet := by
        intro h_mem; apply hu; rcases List.mem_map.mp (List.mem_toFinset.mp h_mem) with ⟨⟨x, y⟩, h_d, h_eq⟩
        have h_v : x ∈ p.support ∧ y ∈ p.support := by
          induction p with | nil => cases h_d | cons _ _ i => cases h_d with | head => simp [support] | tail _ h_d => simp [support, i h_d]
          | loop _ i => cases h_d with | head => simp [support] | tail _ h_d => simp [support, i h_d]
        have h_u_in_e : u ∈ ({x, y} : Sym2 V) := by rw [← h_eq]; simp
        rw [Sym2.mem_iff] at h_u_in_e
        cases h_u_in_e with | inl h => subst h; exact List.mem_toFinset.mpr h_v.1 | inr h => subst h; exact List.mem_toFinset.mpr h_v.2
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem h_e]
      exact Nat.succ_le_succ ih

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges]
  | loop p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (by cases p <;> simp [support])]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.succ_le_succ (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)))
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.succ_le_succ (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)))
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · intro h_mem; simp [edgeSet, edges, darts] at h_mem
        rcases h_mem with ⟨x, y, hd, he⟩
        have : u ∈ {x, y} := by simpa using he
        rcases this with rfl | rfl
        · induction p <;> cases hd <;> simp [support, *]
        · induction p <;> cases hd <;> (try simp [support, *]); rename_i p'; cases p' <;> simp [support]

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | loop p ih =>
    have hu : u ∈ supportSet p := by cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support]
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, hu]
    exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card_insert _ _) 1)
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet p
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact ih.trans (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card_insert _ _) 1)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · intro he
        obtain ⟨d, hd, heq⟩ := mem_map.1 (mem_toFinset.1 he)
        have h_mem : d.1 ∈ support p ∧ d.2 ∈ support p := by
          induction p generalizing d with
          | nil => cases hd
          | loop p' ih' =>
            rcases hd with rfl | hd <;> simp [support]
            · exact ⟨Or.inl rfl, Or.inl rfl⟩
            · rcases ih' hd with ⟨h1, h2⟩; exact ⟨Or.inr h1, Or.inr h2⟩
          | cons h' p' ih' =>
            rcases hd with rfl | hd <;> simp [support]
            · exact ⟨Or.inl rfl, Or.inr (by cases p' <;> simp [support])⟩
            · rcases ih' hd with ⟨h1, h2⟩; exact ⟨Or.inr h1, Or.inr h2⟩
        have : u ∈ Sym2.mk d := heq.symm ▸ Sym2.mem_mk_left _ _
        rcases Sym2.mem_iff.1 this with h | h
        · exact hu (mem_toFinset.2 (h ▸ h_mem.1))
        · exact hu (mem_toFinset.2 (h ▸ h_mem.2))
